Home / Services / Furniture Assembly

Furniture Assembly

Hassle-free furniture assembly for all types of furniture.

Avoid the frustration and time commitment of assembling furniture yourself. Blake LLC provides professional furniture assembly services for all types of furniture, from beds and dressers to desks and bookshelves. We understand that furniture assembly can be challenging, especially with complex instructions and missing parts. Our experienced technicians are equipped to handle any furniture assembly project quickly and efficiently.

We carefully unpack the furniture, inventory the parts, and follow the manufacturer's instructions to ensure proper assembly. We also dispose of the packaging materials, leaving your home clean and clutter-free. Whether you're furnishing a new home in Rittenhouse Square or updating your existing furniture in Manayunk, we can help you save time and avoid the stress of furniture assembly.

We offer competitive pricing and flexible scheduling to meet your needs. Contact us today for a free estimate on your furniture assembly project.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: We unpack the furniture and inventory the parts.
  2. 02 Step 2: We follow the manufacturer's instructions to assemble the furniture.
  3. 03 Step 3: We ensure all parts are properly connected and tightened.
  4. 04 Step 4: We dispose of the packaging materials.

Benefits

  • Save time and effort
  • Avoid frustration
  • Ensure proper assembly
  • Protect your furniture from damage

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of furniture do you assemble?

We assemble all types of furniture, including beds, dressers, desks, bookshelves, tables, chairs, and outdoor furniture.

Do you assemble furniture from IKEA?

Yes, we have extensive experience assembling furniture from IKEA and other popular furniture retailers.

How long does furniture assembly take?

The time required depends on the complexity of the furniture. Simple items can often be assembled in an hour or two, while more complex items may take several hours.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with furniture assembly? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 16107329449
